name: Greens and Garlic
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound greens such as beet, turnip, mustard, broccoli di Rabe or dandelions
Salt and dried red pepper flakes
recipeInstructions:
If you are using very young tender beet greens or mustard greens, stem them, chop the leaves, then sauté in 2 tablespoons olive oil with a clove of garlic until wilted; season to taste.
If the greens you are using are tougher, blanch them for 4 minutes or until tender, then drain well and chop. Only then sauté in garlic and olive oil until heated through; season to taste.
Yield: 2 servings
